records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how you are making small talk, it seems that you are running out of options, descendant of Bygones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, you caught me.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, you caught me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two members from my division are already dead, and Arkon has already suffered a massive loss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two members from my division are already dead, and Arkon has already suffered a massive loss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two members from my division are already dead, and Arkon has already suffered a massive loss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the infantry... There are more than I can count.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the infantry... There are more than I can count.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the infantry... There are more than I can count.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought it might be possible to defeat Maestra when she had no support from her members...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought it might be possible to defeat Maestra when she had no support from her members...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought it might be possible to defeat Maestra when she had no support from her members...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I guess there's a reason she's called the Demogorgon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I guess there's a reason she's called the Demogorgon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I guess there's a reason she's called the Demogorgon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, it's time to bring it to a close...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, it's time to bring it to a close...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, it's time to bring it to a close...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone! I've bound Maestra with my powers!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone! I've bound Maestra with my powers!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone! I've bound Maestra with my powers!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is our last chance...! Fire everything you've got on Maestra...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is our last chance...! Fire everything you've got on Maestra...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is our last chance...! Fire everything you've got on Maestra...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: JUST DIE ALREADY!! You damn Maestra!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: JUST DIE ALREADY!! You damn Maestra!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: JUST DIE ALREADY!! You damn Maestra!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Manually position the gun barrel of armored units that are disconnected from Moneka and fire!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Manually position the gun barrel of armored units that are disconnected from Moneka and fire!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Manually position the gun barrel of armored units that are disconnected from Moneka and fire!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the last chance Yaksha Deputy Commander has given us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the last chance Yaksha Deputy Commander has given us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the last chance Yaksha Deputy Commander has given us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: God-class ground combat vehicle no. 2, Chronos Prototype, ready!
records.m_Talk_DEU: God-class ground combat vehicle no. 2, Chronos Prototype, ready!
records.m_Talk_FRA: God-class ground combat vehicle no. 2, Chronos Prototype, ready!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Detecting sound waves with data corruption. Eliminating target!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Detecting sound waves with data corruption. Eliminating target!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Detecting sound waves with data corruption. Eliminating target!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Open all silos! Volley fire!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Open all silos! Volley fire!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Open all silos! Volley fire!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is absurd. We poured so much firepower, but she's still standing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is absurd. We poured so much firepower, but she's still standing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is absurd. We poured so much firepower, but she's still standing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaah, AAAAACK! Don't shoot! AAAAGH...! I said, don't shoot!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaah, AAAAACK! Don't shoot! AAAAGH...! I said, don't shoot!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaah, AAAAACK! Don't shoot! AAAAGH...! I said, don't shoot!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Save me! Save me! Deputy Commander...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Save me! Save me! Deputy Commander...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Save me! Save me! Deputy Commander...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must compliment your efforts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must compliment your efforts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must compliment your efforts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you might be hiding something, but I froze even before noticing it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you might be hiding something, but I froze even before noticing it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you might be hiding something, but I froze even before noticing it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems that you are able to use a bit of your Bygone ancestors' powers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems that you are able to use a bit of your Bygone ancestors' powers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems that you are able to use a bit of your Bygone ancestors' powers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard only a handful of their descendants are able to use it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard only a handful of their descendants are able to use it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard only a handful of their descendants are able to use it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that was a close one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that was a close one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that was a close one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You heard?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You heard?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You heard?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could a Shadow know that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could a Shadow know that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could a Shadow know that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, you damn rabbit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, you damn rabbit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, you damn rabbit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you don't even know what happened to your Commander...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you don't even know what happened to your Commander...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you don't even know what happened to your Commander...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, Commander Lionel really is here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, Commander Lionel really is here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, Commander Lionel really is here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, shall I end my performance?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, shall I end my performance?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, shall I end my performance?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am curious to hear you scream after you have been acting so arrogantly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am curious to hear you scream after you have been acting so arrogantly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am curious to hear you scream after you have been acting so arrogantly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kgh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kgh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kgh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can look forward to the performance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can look forward to the performance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can look forward to the performance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A harsh punishment awaits you for sabotaging my Orchestra.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A harsh punishment awaits you for sabotaging my Orchestra.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A harsh punishment awaits you for sabotaging my Orchestra.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who's punishing whom? You monster...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who's punishing whom? You monster...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who's punishing whom? You monster...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm here to save you, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm here to save you, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm here to save you, Deputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alice...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alice...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alice...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, isn't that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, isn't that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, isn't that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's Commander Lionel's Beast Claw, isn't it...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's Commander Lionel's Beast Claw, isn't it...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's Commander Lionel's Beast Claw, isn't it...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You saved my life so many times already. So it's my turn now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You saved my life so many times already. So it's my turn now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You saved my life so many times already. So it's my turn now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I'll save you, Judy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I'll save you, Judy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I'll save you, Judy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll save you from this place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll save you from this place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll save you from this place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So won't you follow me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So won't you follow me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So won't you follow me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So that's why.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So that's why.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So that's why.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I kept seeing him when I looked at you all this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I kept seeing him when I looked at you all this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I kept seeing him when I looked at you all this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought you were a stray cat. But now, you can even mimic a lion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought you were a stray cat. But now, you can even mimic a lion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought you were a stray cat. But now, you can even mimic a lion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, look how much you've grown. Our little kitty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, look how much you've grown. Our little kitty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, look how much you've grown. Our little kitty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Little? You know, I'm taller than you if you don't count your ears.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Little? You know, I'm taller than you if you don't count your ears.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Little? You know, I'm taller than you if you don't count your ears.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, get up. We fight together, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, get up. We fight together, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, get up. We fight together, Deputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's defeat that Shadow and successfully wrap up this operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's defeat that Shadow and successfully wrap up this operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's defeat that Shadow and successfully wrap up this operation.

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kgh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can look forward to the performance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can look forward to the performance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can look forward to the performance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A harsh punishment awaits you for sabotaging my Orchestra.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A harsh punishment awaits you for sabotaging my Orchestra.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A harsh punishment awaits you for sabotaging my Orchestra.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shut up...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shut up...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shut up...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who's punishing whom? You monster...!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who's punishing whom? You monster...!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who's punishing whom? You monster...!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm here to save you, Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm here to save you, Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm here to save you, Deputy Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Alice...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Alice...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Alice...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: How are you here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How are you here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How are you here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will not allow anyone to die on my watch anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, isn't that...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, isn't that...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, isn't that...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's Commander Lionel's Beast Claw, isn't it...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's Commander Lionel's Beast Claw, isn't it...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's Commander Lionel's Beast Claw, isn't it...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You saved my life so many times already. So it's my turn now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You saved my life so many times already. So it's my turn now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You saved my life so many times already. So it's my turn now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, I'll save you, Judy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, I'll save you, Judy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, I'll save you, Judy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll save you from this place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll save you from this place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll save you from this place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So won't you follow me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So won't you follow me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So won't you follow me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...So that's why.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...So that's why.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...So that's why.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I kept seeing him when I looked at you all this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I kept seeing him when I looked at you all this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I kept seeing him when I looked at you all this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I just thought you were a stray cat. But now, you can even mimic a lion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I just thought you were a stray cat. But now, you can even mimic a lion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I just thought you were a stray cat. But now, you can even mimic a lion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, look how much you've grown. Our little kitty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, look how much you've grown. Our little kitty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, look how much you've grown. Our little kitty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Little? You know, I'm taller than you if you don't count your ears.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Little? You know, I'm taller than you if you don't count your ears.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Little? You know, I'm taller than you if you don't count your ears.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, get up. We fight together, Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, get up. We fight together, Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, get up. We fight together, Deputy Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's defeat that Shadow and successfully wrap up this operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's defeat that Shadow and successfully wrap up this operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's defeat that Shadow and successfully wrap up this operation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Da Capo. I am growing tired of the repeated patterns.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Da Capo. I am growing tired of the repeated patterns.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Da Capo. I am growing tired of the repeated patterns.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, let us move on to the finale.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, let us move on to the finale.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, let us move on to the finale.
